chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 22 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (Priority) 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of CMA No.109/2023 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 01-10-2025 Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant Advocate General Sindh >>>>>..<<<<< None present for the Petitioners nor any intimation is received. On 17-05-2023, Counsel for the Petitioners was directed to satisfy this Court in view of the bar contained under Article 212 of the Constitution of Islamic Republic of Pakistan, 1973. Thereafter, the matter was fixed on 16-08-2023, but no one turned up to address the question of maintainability. Today the position is same. The perusal of the prayer clause, it reflects that the Petitioners have challenged their seniority list, which can be adjudicated before the Service Tribunal, hence this Court has no jurisdiction to entertain this Petition in view of the bar contained under Article 212 ibid. Resultantly, the Petition is dismissed being not maintainable along with listed application. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
